governingBody: Office of Film and Literature Classification
reasonSummary: 74 page Manifesto published prior to the Christchurch mosque shootings. Banned for promoting murder and terrorism. An appeal was filed by The Kiwi Party Incorporated, and the Board held their prior decision.
